display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official WebKitGTK site; source_facts.name is webkitgtk.
docs_sources: Official WebKitGTK homepage provides API reference documentation under webkitgtk.org/reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage identifies WebKitGTK as the official project; WebKitGTK is developed in the official WebKit source tree.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a GTK interface to WebKit; source_facts.executables includes WebKitWebDriver.
